smoke.detail: Integration branch integration/final merges all 13 endpoint aggregators + core. pixi run pytest -m 'not model' -> 386 passed, 37 deselected, 0 failed. Fixed 2 core test_run.py fixtures that used herg as the 'unbuilt endpoint' example (now every endpoint ships an aggregator): they simulate the absent-aggregator case at the import/load_aggregator seam instead.

note: Final integration gate green across the merged pipeline (13/13 aggregators). Model adapters on their task branches; t34 pbpk + t35 admetlab3 + t36 ochem_ppb remain needs_aaran (external residues); t25 smartcyp blocked by decision; t52 herg is the intended DEFERRED scaffold.
